experiment: recognition (voces-texture) native-tradition test on the pre-1931 model
headline: H1 texture-recognition CONFIRMED (0.91/0.93, beats surprisal +0.41/+0.40) -- era-invariant. DECIDER NULL (greek p=0.83, latin p=0.44) -> the pre-1931 model does NOT represent voces as names. Recognition-without-representation holds even inside the tradition's own era. Greek tok/vox 13.03 (highest of any model -- 1930 English vocab shreds Greek hardest).
